Package org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor

@NullMarked package org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor
Provides classes for advising chat clients.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.springframework.ai.chat.client
    Chat client API.
    org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api
    Provides the API for chat client advisors.
    org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.observation
    Provides the API for chat client advisors observations.
    org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.toolsearch
    Tool Search Tool Advisor package for dynamic tool discovery and search capabilities.
    org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.vectorstore
    Spring AI chat client advisors package.
    org.springframework.ai.chat.client.observation
    Provides classes for observing chat data.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AdvisorUtils
    Utilities to work with advisors.
    ChatModelCallAdvisor
    A CallAdvisor that uses a ChatModel to generate a response.
    ChatModelCallAdvisor.Builder
     
    ChatModelStreamAdvisor
    A StreamAdvisor that uses a ChatModel to generate a streaming response.
    ChatModelStreamAdvisor.Builder
     
    DefaultAroundAdvisorChain
    Default implementation for the BaseAdvisorChain.
    DefaultAroundAdvisorChain.Builder
     
    LastMaxTokenSizeContentPurger
    Returns a new list of content (e.g list of messages of list of documents) that is a subset of the input list of contents and complies with the max token size constraint.
    MessageChatMemoryAdvisor
    Memory is retrieved added as a collection of messages to the prompt
    MessageChatMemoryAdvisor.Builder
     
    SafeGuardAdvisor
    An advisor that blocks the call to the model provider if the user input contains any of the sensitive words.
    SafeGuardAdvisor.Builder
     
    SimpleLoggerAdvisor
    A simple logger advisor that logs the request and response messages.
    SimpleLoggerAdvisor.Builder
     
    StructuredOutputValidationAdvisor
    Advisor that validates the structured JSON output of a chat client response against a JSON schema derived from the configured output type or a pre-supplied schema string.
    StructuredOutputValidationAdvisor.Builder
    Builder for StructuredOutputValidationAdvisor.
    ToolCallAdvisor
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    since 2.0.0 in favor of ToolCallingAdvisor.
    ToolCallAdvisor.Builder<T extends ToolCallAdvisor.Builder<T>>
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    since 2.0.0 in favor of ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder.
    ToolCallingAdvisor
    Recursive Advisor that disables the internal tool execution flow and instead implements the tool calling loop as part of the advisor chain.
    ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<T extends ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<T>>
    Builder for creating instances of ToolCallingAdvisor.
